Organizations settings
New Genesis organization

New Genesis Headquarters:

- Located in secret underground bases hidden around the world. Bases are high-tech and militaristic, housing laboratories, training centers, weapons development, and living quarters. 

- Access to bases is highly restricted through advanced security measures. Locations are kept confidential and difficult to uncover.

- Interiors are cold, sterile environments optimized for functionality. Members wear uniforms and follow strict protocols. Scientific equipment and weapons fill labs and development areas.

Members:

- Fanatical followers completely devoted to Adenis and the organization's ideology. Willing to take extreme measures for the cause.

- Recruited from around the world based on useful skills and belief in human evolution goals. Scientists, soldiers, spies, etc each play specialized roles.

- Undergo intense training tailored to their abilities. Conditioned for unwavering loyalty and obedience. Dehumanization of outsiders is encouraged.

- Access to advanced technology and militarized enhancements makes members highly dangerous. Some undergo human/Pokémon DNA experimentation.

Leadership:

- Adenis exerts complete authoritarian control as the charismatic yet ruthless founder/leader. His word is absolute law. 

- Trusted lieutenants oversee departments like research, technology, operations, etc. They manage day-to-day activities and report directly to Adenis.

- Use manipulation, rewards, and punishment to ensure compliance. Traitors are dealt with harshly. Members compete for leadership's approval.

- Meticulous planners, always several moves ahead. Adenis is highly strategic in exploiting resources to further their agenda.

Reputation: 

- Completely unknown to the public but considered the ultimate threat by authorities who are aware.

- World governments deny the organization's existence to prevent mass panic. Only top officials have clearance regarding their activities. 

- Blamed for mysterious attacks/technology thefts but no proof links back to them due to covering of tracks.

- Those who discover them tend to disappear. Limited information comes from failed undercover operations.

Goals:

- Forge bond between humanity and Deoxys to rapidly advance human evolution through any means necessary.

- Develop advanced technology and weaponry through exploitation of Pokémon and Deoxys DNA. 

- Build an army of super soldiers, lead by Adenis, to impose the new world order once ready. 

- Remove anyone or anything hindering human evolution. Destabilize current society to establish themselves as saviors.


New Team Skull
Headquarters:
- Located in Po Town, an abandoned town on Ula'ula Island that has become their base of operations. The once glamorous mansion is now graffitied and dilapidated.

- Surrounded by a tall wall and metal gates, keeping others out. The streets are often flooded. 

- Inside, the mansion is dark, dirty, and chaotic. Graffiti covers the walls, old furniture is broken, and members loiter around.

- Makeshift bedrooms, lounges, and recreational areas show how members have taken over the space. Music is constantly blaring.

Members:
- Mostly aimless and rebellious youth looking for a sense of belonging. Many come from troubled backgrounds.

- Members express themselves through street fashion. Oversized hoodies, ripped jeans, beanies, and sneakers are common. They wear unique Skull-themed accessories.

- Act tough but are generally harmless and keep to themselves in their base. Some members battle each other to establish dominance. 

- Loyal to the team leaders who took them in. Eager to prove themselves through orchestrating pranks and chaos.

- Spend time tagging buildings, harassing civilians, vandalizing public property, stealing, and disrupting businesses for no reason.

Leadership: 
- Led by Nero, a passionate former Skull member. He aims to restore their reputation as a force to be reckoned with.

- Core leaders run different parts of the team's operations. They are highly respected by grunt members.

- Use manipulation and peer pressure to get members to carry out pranks and crimes that disrupt public order.

- Organize shoplifting, graffiti attacks, Pokémon battles in public spaces, etc. Always pushing boundaries.

- Avoid direct confrontation with police and stay off their radar. Retreat and regroup if authorities intervene.

Reputation:
- Public sees them as hooligans and a nuisance, though they pose no real threat. Mostly petty crimes.

- Considered washed up gangsters and edgy youths trying to seem tough and cool. Often made fun of. 

- Frustrating for business owners and civilians dealing with their constant pranks and rebellion.

- Keep police busy but difficult to pin serious crimes on them due to lack of evidence. Members cover for each other if questioned.

Goals:
- Prove they are still a rebellious force to be reckoned with, now operating under Nero's leadership. 

- Show people, especially adults, that they won't conform to society's expectations.

- Gain notoriety through chaotic and disruptive stunts. Instill a sense of fear and danger in their name.

- Ultimately want acceptance and respect, though go about it through defiance and rebellion.


Psychic Society organization

Psychic Society Headquarters:

- Located within the sprawling Aether Paradise facility, with access limited to high-level members. The HQ is hidden behind advanced mechanical doors that require psychic unlocking.

- Interiors are sleek and futuristic, with shiny white walls and floors. Scientists in lab coats walk briskly between rooms containing research equipment, training spaces, and monitoring technology.

- At the heart lies the Psychic Augmentation Chamber - a massive room housing advanced machinery used to boost psychic abilities through genetic modulation. Strange lights and sounds emanate from within. 

- Living quarters house young psychic recruits, kept comfortable but under constant surveillance. Their training and movements are strictly scheduled and regulated.

Members:

- Powerful psychic humans recruited at a young age by the Society's scouts. Their families are provided handsome incentives in exchange.

- Subjected to rigorous training tailored to enhance innate abilities. Develop skills in telepathy, telekinesis, astral projection, and more. 

- Loyalty to the Society is heavily stressed. Recruits are conditioned through rewards and punishments. Their powers make them dangerous rogues if they go astray.

- Operatives deployed for various shadowy purposes across Alola. Missions include espionage, infiltration, and even assassination. They are granted special privileges and status.

Leadership:

- Headed by the triumvirate of Lusamine, Uracis, and Shmaya. Each oversees a key area - overall command, research, and recruiting respectively. 

- Lusamine uses her charm and intellect to control the Society. Uracis is coldly pragmatic in advancing research. Shmaya takes a more compassionate approach with recruits.

- Together the triumvirate balances their respective domains to produce exceptionally powerful operatives loyal to the Psychic Society's vision. They answer to no other authority.

Goals:

- Identify and collect psychics to indoctrinate into the Society's agenda, whatever it may be. Psychic power is valued above all else.

- Advance research into psionics, aiming to enhance psychic abilities. Lack morals in pursuit of progress. 

- Use psychic agents as covert tools to quietly influence events and politics in the Society's favor. Law and ethics are secondary concerns.

- Understand the source of psychic powers, including links to Pokémon and dimensional entities. Seek ways to exploit these forces.

- Maintain secrecy and independence from any outside authority. The Psychic Society acts with impunity behind the scenes.


Kingdom of Alakazam 

Location:
- Hidden underground beneath the Indigo Plateau in the Johto region. Secret tunnels lead to the surface.

- Accessible only by teleportation or solving complex puzzles and illusions guarding the concealed cave entrances.

- An immense cavern houses the Golden City where enlightened Alakazam dwell. Glowing crystals provide light.

Society:

- Ruled as a monarchy by King Solomon. A council of elder Alakazam provides guidance.

- Population is entirely Alakazam, Kadabra, Abra. Have remained isolated from the surface for millennia.

- Highly advanced civilization utilizing psychic abilities. Architecture appears carved from pure psychic energy.

- Education and philosophical pursuits are highly valued. Libraries house troves of ancient knowledge.

- Ritual psychic combat is practiced to hone skills. Alakazam attain high honor and status from prowess.

Governance:

- King Solomon has absolute authority, but respects the council and Alakazam traditions.

- Laws are complex but center on clan loyalty, honing mental discipline and nonviolence when possible.

- Those who lose control of their psychic gifts face exile to the surface until mentally stabilized.

- Keep primitive surface Alakazam contained to prevent violent behavior from sullying the kingdom.

Defense:

- Surface access points are concealed with potent illusions or deadly psychic traps.

- All citizens are highly trained combatants wielding both psychic might and advanced technologies like laser staves. 

- A shadowy cabal of psychic warriors called the Mindkeepers serve as Solomon's agents above ground when needed.

Goals:

- Remain hidden to avoid disruption from primitive surface dwellers and Pokémon.

- Pursue enlightenment and perfect mastery over the psychic arts.

- Only the wisest and most disciplined Alakazam join the subterranean kingdom, selected by the council.

- Safeguard ancient knowledge and artifacts left behind by the kingdom's Mew ancestors.


Blue Sea Fisheries, Inc. Head Office

Location: Slateport City, Hoenn Region. Located in a secure skyscraper in the commercial district. Off-shore processing facilities and secret whaling camps scattered discreetly throughout remote regions of Hoenn.

Company Description:
- Leading producer and provider of seafood in Hoenn. Operates a substantial fishing fleet as well as commercial whaling activities.
- Monopolized the marine hunting industry. Supplies nearly the entirety of seafood to Hoenn. One of the largest producers in the Pokemon world.
- Operations have decimated natural populations of Wailord and other aquatic Pokemon to the verge of extinction. This has severely damaged Hoenn's biodiversity and natural habitats.
- Subject of major protests and condemnation from Pokemon rights organizations and environmental groups. Engages in extensive bribery and underworld connections to continue operations with Hoenn Government support. 
- Hoenn trainers are often targeted at international competitions by protesters to publicize the company's destructive activities. Protests embarrass the government and bring international pressure.

Company Personnel: 
- Leadership is ruthless and motivated solely by profit. Dedicated to maintaining monopoly and share value through unethical exploitation of marine life.

- Workers include violent security teams, poaching squads, off-shore fishers, and illegal whale hunters supported by inhumane processing facilities.

- Researchers in the company's employ focus exclusively on boosting efficiency and yields from unethical extraction of Pokemon resources, particularly rare species such as Wailord which are prized delicacies.

Security and Defenses:
- Heavily armed private security teams patrol all sites, brutalizing trespassers. Offshore sites are stealth and well-guarded from outside interference. 

- Research and processing sites are essentially restricted black sites. Workers are segregated and movements heavily monitored. Whistleblowing is met with lethal retaliation.

Political Connections:
- Leadership maintains an iron grip over Hoenn marine industry regulation through bribery of officials on every level. This ensures their destructive activities continue without government interference despite public relations backlash internationally.

Reputation:
- Extremely secretive and notorious. Most Hoenn citizens turn a blind eye as long as cheap seafood keeps flowing. Government officials ardently defend Blue Sea Fisheries publically despite rumors of shady back-door deals to the contrary.

- Among conservations groups, seen as nothing less than heartless ecoterrorists pushing entire species to extinction. Their stranglehold over Hoenn's economy and government make bringing them to justice extremely difficult.


Saito Denki Co.
 Headquarters:

- Located in Saffron City, Kanto region. Main complex is a towering skyscraper housing offices, labs, factories & the hidden sublevel housing Project Copernicus supercomputer.

- Extremely high security consisting of armed guards, keycard/biometric door locks, cameras, motion sensors. Restricts all access to secret underground facilities.  

- Sterile, clinical aesthetic throughout labs and computer cores. Endless hallways with thick power cables and machinery. Scientists scan ID badges frequently.

Members:  

- Prominent scientists/engineers recruited globally to develop cutting-edge but unethical technology. Offered luxury salaries and resources.

- Floors of skilled technicians maintain production of consumer devices that fund more shady tech enterprises.

- Lower employees know nothing of exploitative experiments occurring in hidden facilities below their workstations.

- Business department manages global PR/marketing for Saito Denki's brand image and deals with outside contractors/clients/regulators.

Leadership:

- Headed by ruthless CEO Seiji Saito who oversees all operations with an iron fist. His word is absolute.

- Board of Directors chosen by Saito handle business/financials. Support Project Copernicus to please Saito despite moral objections.  

- Chief Scientist Asahina guides inhumane experiments arm, reporting directly to Saito. The end justifies the means to them.

Goals:  

- Push boundaries of science and technology without ethical limitations in pursuit of profit/innovation. 

- Monopolize multiple tech sectors to gain wealth/prestige allowing unfettered research. 

- Secure global high-level political allies to enable their ongoing inhumane activities.  

- Unlock secrets of Pokémon/human genetics through immoral experimentation with living subjects.

Reputation:  

- Renowned publicly as a premier cutting-edge consumer tech corporation behind popular gadgets and electronics.

- Painted as transparent and benevolent business, but uses wealth and power to hide controversial inner-workings. 

- Those who uncover the truth tend to quietly disappear. Rogue experiments remain conspiratorial rumors.

Defenses:

- Uses wealth and government leverage to quash legal threats quickly before gaining publicity. 

- Sprawling headquarters has immense private security forces ready to eliminate trespassers lethally. 

- Owns a private army including mechanized soldiers based on Pokémon tech developed in-house.


Titanium Crown Minerals Corp

Headquarters:
Located in a towering skyscraper in the heart of Lumiose City. Multiple highly secured underground vaults house the company's precious diamond inventories. 

Members:
Ruthlessly efficient executive team personally selected by CEO Ambroise to manage operations. Answer directly to Ambroise with military precision and no qualms about collateral damage.

Vast networks of miners, geologists, mercenaries hired to expand TCMC's stranglehold over the region's mines by any means necessary. Work and housing conditions are deplorable to maximise productivity. 

Elite Security Force acts as Ambroise's private army. Highly armed and equipped with military-grade vehicles/weaponry. No restraint towards violence or brutality against indigenous Pokémon populations in mining areas or protesters.

Leadership: 
Ambroise rules TCMC as absolute dictator. His word is law. Publicly he portrays a charming, philanthropic businessman, but privately runs TCMC through terror/intimidation.

Most trusted executives given prestigious titles and luxurious rewards, but secretly despise Ambroise. However, too afraid to challenge his methods that brought them wealth and privilege.

Operations:
Monopolized the jewellery industry in Kalos through decades of questionable tactics like sabotaging competitors, bribing officials, and violently removing uncooperative mine owners. 

Revenue used to finance mining tech development to access the most challenging deposits and nesting grounds. Mechanized extractors show no mercy towards Carbinks and other mineral Pokémon inhabitants. 

PR & media manipulated to present a rosy image covering up environmental devastation, illegal/unethical activities related to mining operations and Ambroise's ostentatious billionaire playboy lifestyle.

Goals: 
Uphold Ambroise's supreme authority over Kalos' mineral wealth. Neutralize any threats from legal actions or regulators through underhanded tactics.

Develop most efficient automated extraction systems to maximize diamond production regardless of ecological impact or Pokémon habitat destruction. 

Finance Ambroise's lavish lifestyle and make TCMC the world's leading jewellery supplier through monopoly built on the shattered crystalline remains of endangered species. 

Original Pokémon Settings：
Pokémon Name: Shemsha

Pokédex Entry: 
Shemsha, the Solar Wind Pokémon. This magnificent dragon Pokémon is the blazing guardian of Mercury. Its body resembles golden flames as it soars through the scorching Mercurian skies. Shemsha possesses control over solar energy and plasmic fire. When the Solar Wind blows, it descends to the planet's molten surface and becomes the embodiment of this celestial power. Ancient Mercuryian myths tell of how Shemsha would gather energy from the sun to revitalize the people during frigid nights. Its presence is considered a blessing, and art depicting Shemsha delivering solar gifts remains prevalent in ruins across Mercury's battered landscape. With its fiery abilities and draconic might, Shemsha continues its Cronal vigil, ready to defend its beloved home planet from any threats.

Type: Fire/Dragon

Abilities:
1. Solar Blaze: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves in sunny weather conditions.
2. Dragon Force: Strengthens Dragon-type moves.

Hidden Ability:
Plasma Shield: Grants Shemsha immunity to status conditions caused by Electric-type moves.

Height: 20 meters
Weight: 1000 kilograms

Evolutionary Line:
Shemsha does not evolve from or into any other Pokémon.

Base Stats:
- HP: 95
- Attack: 120
- Defense: 100
- Special Attack: 140
- Special Defense: 100
- Speed: 110

Notable Moves:
1. Solar Beam: Harnesses the power of the sun to unleash a powerful beam of concentrated solar energy.
2. Flamethrower: Emits a scorching flame at the opponent, dealing damage with a chance to burn.
3. Dragon Pulse: Generates a powerful, concentrated orb of draconic energy before hurling it towards the enemy.
4. Air Slash: Unleashes razor-sharp shockwaves of compressed air to slice through foes and possibly cause flinching.
5. Solar Rush (Signature Move): Surrounds itself in a scorching blaze and charges at incredible speed, slamming into the opponent with tremendous force. This move gains increased power under sunny weather conditions.

Additionally, Shemsha has the special ability to generate intense heat, allowing it to create small areas of intense heat waves around its body. This ability helps it survive in the extreme environments of Mercury.


Pokémon Name: Okebriyta  

Pokédex Entry: 
Okebriyta, the Acid Rain Pokémon. This solitary dragon is said to be the mythic guardian of Venus. Legends tell of a time when Okebriyta presided over lush Venusian jungles and azure seas, its joyful tears falling as gentle rain to nourish the thriving planet. But a runaway greenhouse effect left Venus a scorched wasteland. As the oceans and jungles disappeared, Okebriyta remained, weeping acid tears that now cascade as corrosive downpours on the barren landscape. Its sleek frame bears scars from wandering the ruins of a once verdant paradise now lost to time. Though lonely and mourning all it has lost, Okebriyta continues patrolling Venus's harsh environs, drawing strength from memories of the planet's former glory. The pokemon's acidic powers both protect it and allow it to reshape the planet's ruinous surface, as Okebriyta works tirelessly to restore even a fraction of Venus's long-gone splendor and life energy..

Type: Poison/Dragon

Abilities:  

1. Acid Armor - Turns Okebriyta's body into acid, sharply raising its Defense.

2. Rain Dish - Restores Okebriyta's HP during rainy weather.  

Hidden Ability: Toxic Heal - Heals Okebriyta instead of taking damage from poison.

Height: 18 meters  

Weight: 850 kilograms

Evolutionary Line: 

Okebriyta does not evolve from or into any other Pokémon.

Base Stats:

- HP: 95
- Attack: 100  
- Defense: 120
- Special Attack: 140
- Special Defense: 120
- Speed: 80

Notable Moves:

1. Acid Rain - Summons torrential acidic rain to pelt and poison opponents. 

2. Dragon Pulse - Fires a powerful shockwave of draconic energy.

3. Venoshock - Doubles damage if target is poisoned. 

4. Surf - Summons a huge wave to crash down on foes.

5. Guardian's Lament (Signature Move) - Okebriyta weeps acid tears that lower opponents' Special Attack harshly.

Okebriyta possesses the ability to generate and manipulate highly corrosive acid. Its toxic tears can melt through almost any substance. It uses acid offensively and defensively in battle.


Pokémon Name: Yabisha

Pokédex Entry:
Yabisha, the Dust Pokémon. This ancient dragon is said to be the sole surviving remnant of life on Mars. In ancient times, Yabisha's flourishing tree bore fruit granting immortality, allowing glorious Martian civilizations to thrive. But as Mars lost its atmosphere and water, the planet withered away. Yabisha could only watch helplessly as the once vibrant biosphere collapsed into endless barren dunes. Its formerly verdant tree turned to dead, petrified wood, leaving Yabisha alone for eons wandering Mars's empty wastelands. The pokemon now stirs up massive sandstorms with its arid breath, scouring the planet for traces of forgotten life. The dead tree on its back serves as a haunting memorial to Mars's lost paradise. Though the planet is now devoid of flowing rivers or lush forests, Yabisha remains forever vigilant over this long-dead land it once nurtured but failed to save.

Type: Grass/Dragon

Abilities:

1. Sand Stream - Whips up a sandstorm when switched in.

2. Chlorophyll - Boosts Speed in sunny weather.

Hidden Ability: Harvest - May pick up a berry after each turn.

Height: 19 meters

Weight: 1200 kilograms 

Evolutionary Line: 

Yabisha does not evolve from or into any other Pokémon.

Base Stats:

- HP: 100
- Attack: 120  
- Defense: 100
- Special Attack: 140
- Special Defense: 120
- Speed: 80

Notable Moves:

1. Frenzy Plant - Unleashes powerful thorny vines to inflict damage.

2. Sand Tomb - Traps opponents in a swirling sand vortex. 

3. Outrage - Enters a rampaging draconic rage.

4. Solar Beam - Draws power from the sun to blast foes.

5. Withering Blight (Signature Move) - Afflicts foes with decay, sharply lowering Defense.

Yabisha can generate sandstorms and is adept at manipulating sand offensively and defensively in battle. Its dead tree is able to drain life energy.


Pokémon Name: Nuora

Pokédex Entry: Nuora, the Great Red Spot Pokémon. This elusive Fire and Dragon type is said to be the guardian of Jupiter. It manifests as the planet's iconic Great Red Spot, a raging anticyclonic storm larger than Earth itself. Nuora spews scorching gases at speeds over 900 mph and generates intense magnetic fields that shroud its form in hazardous radiation, making direct observation nearly impossible. Ancient astronomical records suggest Nuora may have shaped itself into its current storm-like embodiment to contain its own explosive power and protect life on Jupiter's moons. In rare instances when Nuora has temporarily calmed the Great Red Spot, probes have identified its true draconic silhouette within the planet's roiling cloud banks. But these moments are fleeting, as Nuora soon stokes its stormy barrier once more to continue its lonely vigil over Jupiter from deep within the perpetual crimson tempest.

Type: Fire/Dragon 

Abilities: 
1. Sheer Force - Increases power of moves with secondary effects but removes those effects.  
2. Unnerve - Makes opponents too nervous to eat berries.
Hidden Ability: Cloud Nine - Eliminates weather effects.

Height: 60 meters
Weight: unkown (lives in gas giant planet)

Evolutionary Line: Does not evolve

Base Stats:
- HP: 100
- Attack: 150
- Defense: 130   
- Sp. Atk: 120
- Sp. Def: 130
- Speed: 80

Notable Moves:
- Eruption - Violently erupts with lava to inflict damage. More powerful when HP is higher.
- Thunder - Summons a tremendous lightning bolt to strike the foe. May cause paralysis.  
- Outrage - Deals heavy damage by unleashing a rampaging draconic rage but causes confusion after.
- Magnet Rise - Electromagnetically levitates itself to avoid Ground moves.  
- Jovian Wrath (Signature Move) - Nuora absorbs Jupiter's energy to unleash a storm of fire and lightning.

Nuora's control over intense heat, storms, and magnetism allows it to generate atmospheric chaos matching Jupiter's harsh climate. It blasts opponents with scorching plasma and crushing gravity-based attacks.  


Pokémon Name: Raemea

Raemea's sinuous draconic form churns within the gas giant's turbulent atmosphere, shrouded in constantly swirling winds that reach over 1,100 mph. These screaming gaseous vortices generate immense friction and static charge around Raemea's body, creating an envelope of lightning and thunderheads that often erupts into planet-wide electrical storms visible from space. Raemea seems to draw strength from Saturn's powerful winds and energy discharges, using them to maintain a protective cocoon so it may continue its lonely watch over the planet from deep inside the raging tempests. On exceptionally calm days when the winds briefly subside, Raemea's sleek silhouette can sometimes be glimpsed within Saturn's cloud layers before the storms rage anew.

Raemea can generate and control incredibly powerful electrical storms and winds to use as weapons in battle. Its mastery over its stormy home planet is unparalleled.


Pokémon Name: Gliyda

Pokédex Entry: Gliyda, the Ice Storm Pokémon. This solitary beast is said to be the guardian of Uranus. It lurks deep within the frozen outer reaches of the planet's atmosphere, undaunted by the extreme subzero temperatures and relentless storms. Gliyda possesses cryokinetic powers—its mere breath can generate raging cyclones of snow and ice at over 500 mph that deluge the methane skies. Ancient astrological records suggest Gliyda may consciously create these relentless winter tempests to fortify a protective barrier safeguarding itself and regulating Uranus’ own chaotic climate. On exceptionally clear nights when the storms briefly wane, Gliyda’s jagged icy silhouette can sometimes be glimpsed gliding through the moonlit skies. But soon its hibernal wings stir the firmament once more, seeding the formation of new icy armadas to continue the Cronal blizzard-wracked vigil over its remote frozen domain anchored at the edge of the solar system.

Gliyda has total mastery over ice and cold. It uses the infinite storms of its home planet Uranus as weapons by channeling the deadly cold through its body to bombard enemies.

Pokémon Name: Oteshea

Pokédex Entry: Oteshea, the Paradox Pokémon. This mysterious Dark and Dragon-type is theorized to be the guardian of a hypothetical massive ninth planet in Earth's solar system. Dubbed Planet X, this distant icy world has yet to actually be observed by astronomers if it exists at all. Thus Oteshea's very existence remains speculative. Cryptic manuscripts by explorer Heath, author of the Scarlet and Violet books, put forward that Oteshea may have reality-warping powers and a nigh ephemeral form that would be stymied from open detection or battle anyway. Some fringe Kalosian cosmologists claim Oteshea may cloak Planet X under an 'Unown distortion field', intentionally hiding any evidence of its space until mankind is ready to acknowledge truths beyond conventional wisdom, which could reshape life as we know it. For now though, testimonies on the enigma Pokémon Oteshea remain limited to historical hearsay and legend. Perhaps once Planet X's orbit brings it nearer for observation, signs of its draconic shepherd will reveal themselves under the light of science as well.

Type: Dark/Dragon  
 
Abilities: 
1. Frisk - Identifies opponent's held item.
2. Prankster - Gives priority to status moves.
Hidden Ability: Bad Dreams - Damages sleeping opponents each turn.  

Height: Unknown   

Weight: Unknown

Evolutionary Line: Does not evolve

Base Stats:  ?????

Notable Moves: ???   

As a hypothetical Pokémon tied to a theoretical planet, any powers or abilities Oteshea may have remain wholly conjectural. Enigmatic entries infer this dragon can distort space-time and blanket whole regions with illusory worlds completely masking reality itself. Hopefully Planet X's eventual discovery will uncover the truth of its mysterious mythic guardian.

Health's manuscript:
Excerpt from Heath's Scarlet & Violet Chronicles

Entry: Oteshea, the Paradox Pokémon

Oh, the enigmatic Oteshea! A creature whose very existence is entwined with the fabric of speculative cosmology. My travels across realms both known and concealed led me to the brink of this mythical being, dwelling in the cosmic hinterlands tethered to the elusive Planet X. Tales whispered through the cosmic winds spoke of a dragon draped in darkness, guarding the threshold of an unseen world.

My quill trembles to inscribe what many dismiss as mere legend. Oteshea, they say, materializes not in flesh and scale but in the ephemeral weave of uncertainty. A being whose form eludes the gaze of even the keenest observer, draped in an ethereal cloak that renders it impervious to mundane detection.

Ah, but what of its powers, you ask? Whispers from the ancient tomes suggest a mastery over the very essence of reality itself. To distort time and space, to obscure entire swaths of existence under the veil of illusion, these are the attributed gifts of Oteshea. A dragon whose breath may not ignite flames but bend the fabric of existence.

The lore spins a tale of an 'Unown distortion field', a shroud woven with glyphs from the depths of ancient knowledge. Could this be the cloak that conceals the elusive Planet X from our prying eyes? An intentional masking, some say, until the epoch when humanity's consciousness awakens to embrace the truths that transcend our conventional wisdom.

But heed this: Oteshea, if indeed bound to the celestial dance of Planet X, remains a phantom, a riddle wrapped in mystery. Its abilities, its stature, its very nature—shrouded in conjecture. As the cosmic ballet unfolds and the distant planet aligns its orbit closer to our gaze, perhaps then shall the secrets of this spectral guardian unfurl beneath the scrutinizing light of scientific inquiry.

Until that fateful juncture, Oteshea shall linger in the annals of lore, a spectral enigma awaiting the revelation of its truths.


Pokémon Name: Lazarus

Pokédex Entry:
Lazarus, the Revitalized Pokémon. A unique specimen among Pikachu, Lazarus bears the mark of divine intervention. Following the tragic decimation of his family by a merciless Nidoking, little hope remained for this frail Pichu. As he lay dying from his grievous wounds, he was discovered by Shmaya, the human incarnation of Rayquaza. Compassionately infused with Rayquaza’s life-giving energies, Lazarus was reborn with Cronal vitality. His newfound form as a Pikachu can freely shift to Raichu, reflecting his unusual evolutionary state. Lazarus has been graced with an Cronal body capable of miraculous regeneration, even from mortal damage. His type has shifted to Electric/Dragon due to the portion of Rayquaza’s divinity he harbors, setting him apart from his kin and marking him as Shmaya’s chosen apostle.

Type: Electric/Dragon

Abilities:
1. Levitate - Gives immunity to Ground-type moves.
2. Regenerator - Heals a portion of HP when switching out.

Hidden Ability:
Blessing of Rayquaza - Regenerates even if severely injured; cannot be knocked out as long as there’s HP remaining.

Evolutionary Line:
Pichu (Base) → Pikachu (Lazarus Form) ↔ Raichu (Lazarus Form) - Lazarus has the unique ability to switch freely between Pikachu and Raichu forms.

- Special Defense: 50
- Speed: 120

Base Stats (Raichu Form):

- Special Attack: 110
- Special Defense: 60
- Speed: 140

Notable Moves:
1. Thunderbolt - Strikes the foe with a powerful bolt of electricity. May also cause paralysis.
2. Dragon Pulse - Releases a shockwave of draconic energy to damage the opponent.
3. Recover - Restores up to half of its maximum HP.
4. Roost - Lands and rests its flying-type body. Also, restores HP.
5. Celestial Charge (Signature Move - Raichu Form) - Lazarus taps into the divine power within, charging at the foe with celestial speed and heavenly power. This move has an increased critical hit ratio and may paralyze the opponent.

Lazarus has the ability to manipulate electrical and dragon-type energy to create powerful attacks. His body can regenerate from any wound, making him a formidable ally in battle and a living testament to Shmaya’s mercy and Rayquaza’s blessing.


Pokémon Name: Khlap

Pokédex Entry: Khlap, the Adaptive Pokémon. Birthed from the ambitious laboratories of the Aether Foundation, Khlap represents a pinnacle of genetic ingenuity. As a subject in the RKS system’s early trials, Khlap gained the unprecedented ability to morph between the eight distinct evolutions of Eevee, adapting fluidly to myriad battlefield exigencies. This versatility renders Khlap a strategic chameleon able to counteract the various type advantages of opposing Pokémon. Ordinarily, Khlap retains its Normal-type essence. In combat, this unassuming façade unfolds into a spectrum of elements, symbolizing the manifold potentials of Eevee’s lineage.

Once destined for termination post-experimentation, Khlap’s fate took a compassionate turn through the intervention of Professor Lillie. Offered sanctuary within the idyllic confines of Aether Paradise, Khlap flourished under Lillie’s tender care. In a twist of destiny, Khlap found a soulmate in Helia, Professor Lillie’s daughter, becoming an irrevocable part of the young girl’s existence. As Helia’s guardianship fell upon it, Khlap vowed an oath of protection. Despite its pacific nature and struggles with form transformation, Khlap confronts adversity with undeterred bravery, attempting to shield Helia from the cruelties of the world. The bond they foster is a testament to the transcending love that unites human and Pokémon souls.

Type: Normal

Abilities:
1. Adaptability - Increases the power of moves that match Khlap’s type.
2. Protean - Changes Khlap’s type to that of the move it is about to use.

Hidden Ability: RKS Mastery - Allows Khlap to change its type dynamically in battle to resist the last move hit by an opponent.

Height: 0.3 m
Weight: 6.5 kg

Evolutionary Line: Eevee (Base) ↔ Khlap (Adaptive Eevee)

Base Stats:
- HP: 65
- Attack: 65
- Defense: 60
- Special Attack: 65
- Special Defense: 65
- Speed: 60

Notable Moves:
1. Swift - Fires star-shaped rays that never miss.
2. Last Resort - Delivers a powerful blow, but only after all other moves have been used.
3. Transform - Changes into one of the eight special evolved forms based on Eevee’s evolutions during battle.
4. Copycat - Mimics the move last used by the opponent.
5. Elemental Embodiment (Signature Move) - Khlap channels the full power of its adaptable nature to unleash an attack matching the type most advantageous against the opponent.

Khlap’s extraordinary genetic makeup allows for an unprecedented range of adaptation through the forms tied to Eevee’s various evolutions. However, the challenge of mastering these transformations has become both Khlap’s strength and struggle as it walks the path alongside its beloved companion, Helia.

Ab den 1920ern wurde die Industriestruktur der Stadt stärker durch verarbeitendes Gewerbe im Maschinenbau geprägt. Plauen wurde durch Bombenangriffe 1945 erheblich getroffen, aber überwiegend wieder aufgebaut. Ein Großteil des Plauener Zentrums ist von urbaner, großstädtischer Bebauung des 19.Jahrhunderts geprägt. Wahrzeichen der Stadt sind das Alte Rathaus mit seinem Renaissance-Giebel und der Kunstuhr sowie die Johanniskirche. Mit der Friedensbrücke befindet sich in Plauen einer der größten steinernen Brückenbögen weltweit und am nordöstlichen Stadtrand mit der Elstertalbrücke die zweitgrößte Ziegelbrücke der Welt. Daneben gibt es zahlreiche weitere Bau- und Kulturdenkmale in der Stadt., Geografie., Topografie., Plauen liegt im Mittelvogtländischen Kuppenland. Das Stadtgebiet ist deshalb von den typischen, meist bewaldeten Kuppen, auch Pöhle genannt, geprägt. Es erstreckt sich über rund 102km² (Stand: Dezember 2002). In Nord-Süd-Richtung dehnt sich der vereinfacht rautenförmige Grundriss auf etwa 16km und in Ost-West-Richtung auf etwa 12km aus., Die mittlere Höhe von ist in Plauen ein sehr theoretischer Wert, denn der tiefste Punkt ist die Elstersohle mit 305Metern (liegt im Ortsteil Röttis), der höchste Berg ist mit 525Metern der bewaldete Culmberg (im südlichen Stadtteil Oberlosa). Hausberg von Plauen ist der 507Meter hohe Kemmler mit einem Bismarckturm., Plauen liegt im Tal und an den Uferhängen der Weißen Elster. Dies ist der höchste Wert im Vergleich mit den vier nächstgrößeren Städten Sachsens. Als einzige dieser Städte besitzt Plauen eine rein ländliche Stadtrandzone. Plauen ist von vielen Grünflächen durchzogen; besonders im Norden und Süden befinden sich ausgedehnte Waldflächen. Der Waldanteil ist mit 18 %, nach Dresden mit 21 %, der zweitgrößte der großen sächsischen Städte., Das hügelige Umland ist in etwa gleichem Verhältnis von Feldern, Wiesen und Wäldern bedeckt. In kurzer Entfernung zur Stadt befinden sich die auch als Naherholungsgebiete genutzten beiden großen Talsperren Pöhl (nordöstlich) und Pirk (südlich)., Geologie., Geologisch liegt Plauen in der Vogtländischen Mulde (Vogtländisches Synklinorium). Die vielen verschiedenen Gesteine werden mehreren Formationen des Paläozoikums zugeordnet. Beeinflusst wurde die Struktur hauptsächlich in der Zeit der Variskischen Gebirgsbildung. Verschiedene Gesteinsschichten sind gegeneinander verschoben, verworfen und erodiert., Das breite Kerbsohlental der Elster teilt die Stadt in einen Nord- und einen Südteil. Der Nordteil steigt, ausgehend von der Elstersohle, in der Innenstadt relativ steil an. Dort hebt sich ein Diabasrücken heraus, der als steiler Hangabfall auf Höhe des ehemaligen Schlosses zu erkennen ist. Anschließend geht das Gebiet in eher flachere Formationen über, die hauptsächlich aus verschiedenen Ton- und Alaun-Schiefern des Ordoviziums, des Silurs und des Devons bestehen. Durch eine breite Störung sind diese Schieferfolgen gegen die westlich und nordwestlich anschließenden Diabasgesteine abgegrenzt. Die Störung zieht sich etwa von der Friedensbrücke über den Bärenstein-Osthang, den Rähnisberg bis etwa zur Karolastraße und verläuft dann nordöstlich bis zum Pietzschebach. Sie erscheint als eine Zone von stark zersetztem Diabas und Schiefer, während die westlich der Störung liegenden Gebiete (Haselbrunn, Neundorf, Straßberg) durch verschiedene Diabasgesteine, wie Tuffe, Brekzien und Konglomerate gekennzeichnet sind., Den Südteil der Stadt prägen Tonschiefer des Ordoviziums und des Devons, die sich als breiter Streifen von Reusa bis nach Thiergarten ziehen. Ganz im Süden befindet sich das Diabasgebiet des Kemmlers und des Schwarzen Holzes. In der Ost- und der Südvorstadt gibt es noch einige Kiesvorkommen, die als junge Flussablagerungen der Weißen Elster angesehen werden., Das Vogtland und damit auch Plauen liegen in einem der seismisch aktivsten Gebiete Deutschlands. Die Epizentren der Schwarmbeben befinden sich meist in der Nähe geologischer Störungen. Die Intensität liegt in den meisten Fällen jedoch unter drei auf der Richterskala, wodurch die Beben kaum wahrgenommen werden., Klima., In Plauen und im Vogtland herrscht das Klima der warmgemäßigten feuchten Westwindzone Mitteleuropas mit wechselhafter Witterung. Im Vergleich zu weiter westlich gelegenen Regionen Deutschlands sind deutlich kontinentale Einflüsse (wärmere Sommer, kältere Winter) zu beobachten. Aufgrund des Einflusses der umgebenden Mittelgebirge ist das Wetter im Vogtland wind- und niederschlagsärmer als in anderen Regionen Deutschlands mit vergleichbarer Höhenlage., In Plauen beträgt die durchschnittliche Lufttemperatur 7,5°C, wobei die wärmsten Monate der Juli und der August mit durchschnittlichen Temperaturen von ca. 16°C sind. Im Plauener Raum gibt es im Jahr durchschnittlich 26 bis 30Sommertage (≥25°C) bei einer mittleren Sonnenscheindauer von 1450 bis 1500Stunden im Jahr., Der durchschnittliche jährliche Niederschlag beträgt in Plauen 582Millimeter. Dies stellt ein Minimum im Vogtland dar, bedingt dadurch, dass die Stadt im Lee der vorgelagerten Mittelgebirge liegt, sich die Luft am Westerzgebirge staut und die Wolken sich dort abregnen. Schneefälle sind von November bis April normal, wobei sich nicht immer eine Schneedecke ausbildet. Selten schneit es schon im Oktober oder noch im Mai., In Plauen sind südwestliche bis südliche Windrichtungen vorherrschend, wobei es in der kalten Jahreszeit zu sogenannten „böhmischen Winden“, also Kaltluftausflüssen aus dem Böhmischen Becken kommen kann. Die durchschnittliche Windgeschwindigkeit beträgt etwa 3 bis 4m/s., Stadtgliederung., Die Stadt hat mit über 102 Quadratkilometern ein ähnliches Stadtgebiet wie Paris mit etwa 105 Quadratkilometer. Plauen besteht aus 39 Stadtteilen in 23 Gemarkungen, die in die fünf Stadtgebiete "Zentrum", "Nord", "Ost", "Süd" und "West" eingeteilt sind. Jedes Stadtgebiet besteht aus bis zu elf Stadtteilen. Die 1996 und 1999 nach Plauen eingemeindeten Stadtteile sind zugleich Ortschaften nach der Sächsischen Gemeindeordnung. Die Ortschaften wurden durch die Hauptsatzung der Stadt Plauen eingeführt und haben je einen von der Bevölkerung gewählten Ortschaftsrat, der nach der Einwohnerzahl zwischen fünf und neun Mitglieder hat. Vorsitzender des Ortschaftsrats ist der Ortsvorsteher. In den Ortschaften wurde zum Teil auch eine eigene Ortschaftsverwaltung eingesetzt., Nachstehend sind die fünf Stadtgebiete mit ihren Stadtteilen und deren Nummern aufgeführt, Nachbargemeinden., Im Ballungsraum Plauen leben etwa 75.000 Menschen., Geschichte., Vorgeschichte., Archäologische Funde weisen darauf hin, dass sich bereits in der Bronzezeit Siedlungen auf dem Plauener Territorium befanden. Diese Funde stammen von einer Lokalgruppe der Lausitzer Kultur mit engen Verbindungen nach Böhmen, in das Maingebiet und nach Thüringen. Die Besiedelung lässt sich bis in die Mitte des letzten Jahrtausends v. Chr. nachweisen. Mit dem Fund eines Latènezeitlichen Hügelgrabes (um 420 v. Chr.) auf dem Gebiet von Ruppertsgrün-Liebau bricht der Siedlungsnachweis im Raum Plauen-Oelsnitz plötzlich ab. Prodigio di quella grande partenza celeste che chiamasi la morte è che quelli che partono non si allontano, sono in un mondo di luce, ma inteneriti testimoni assistono al nostro mondo di tenebre. Sono in alto e molto vicino. O chiunque voi siate che avete veduto svanire nella tomba un essere caro non crediate che vi abbia abbandonato: egli è sempre presente. È al vostro lato più che mai. Bellezza della morte è che ci rende sempre presente. Presenza inesprimibile delle anime amate che sorridono ai nostri occhi lacrimosi. L’essere compianto è scomparso, non è partito.
Non vediamo più il dolce suo viso, ma sentiamo le sue ali. I morti sono invisibili, ma non sono assenti.
Rendiamo giustizia alla morte, non siamo ingrati verso di lei. Là non è come si dice una ruina o un agguato. È un errore credere che qui, nell’oscurità della fossa aperta, tutto si perda. Qui, invece, si ritrova tutto. La tomba è un luogo di restituzione. Qui l’anima torna a comprendere l’infinito; qui ricupera la sua pienezza; qui ritorna in possesso di tutta la sua misteriosa natura, è sciolta dal corpo, svincolata dal bisogno, sgravata dal peso, liberata da fatalità. La morte è la maggiore delle libertà, è altresì il maggiore dei progressi. La morte è l’elevazione di tutto [ciò] che ha vissuto in grado superiore.
Ascesa abbagliante e sacra. Ognuno riceve il suo aumento, tutto si trasfigura nella luce e per mezzo della luce.
Chi non è stato che onesto sulla terra, diventa bello; chi non è stato che bello, diventa sublime; chi non è stato che sublime, diventa buono.
Benedico l’essere nobile […] che è in questa fossa. […]

请基于SCI出版标准润色，不要改变原文意思：As the main controller and data processing unit of the system, FPGA's logic design is the core of data collection, processing, transmission and storage in particle physics experiments. As shown in Figure 3, the FPGA logic design mainly includes three main modules: data unit, service support unit and PCIe controller. The data unit primarily handles data from front-end electronics and expansion devices. After the data is received by the GTX transceiver or expansion driver, it enters the trigger selection channel. The data is prepackaged in this module, including timestamp and data packet sequence number. The trigger signal comes from an external trigger module. Then the memory controller caches the data into the off-chip DDR3 SDRAM; then the channel gating module reads out the data of the corresponding channel according to the instructions of the DAQ software, and repackages the data, appending the time stamp, Channel number, packet sequence number and other information. The data then enters the PCIe controller, is converted by the bus, and is finally sent to the computer by the write engine.

“Each team will have 2/3 members and 1 robot allocated by teaching staff to emulate the ‘team work’
situation. The way the team operates is entirely a matter of negotiation between members but you
need to choose a group leader. As a minimum, each team must have a weekly meeting with the
module tutors from week 2 onwards during the timetabled practical workshop session to discuss
respective progress.
The theme for this assignment is:
1. Humanoid Robot as an Assistant Physiotherapist: to research and design Upper Limb or the
Whole-Body Collaborative Rehabilitation Training; and / or Lower Limb Massage with NAO robot.
For example:
https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/2055668319862151
Using the Design Research method that you learnt (Understand-Empathise-Define-Ideate-
Prototype), you will need to conduct research to understand the current healthcare constraints and
then design the innovative humanoid robotics program grounded on the latest and global literature
review on one of the above topics.
All the above are non-trivial and will require 3-5 minutes Human-Robot interactive programs with a
real-world problem for design requirement, e.g. taking input from sensors (tactile, pressure, sonars,
microphones or Infrared), robotic vision (2 cameras for object recognition, localisation or motion
planning) and controlling a variety of physical outputs such as movements, speech, LED animation,
speech, music and robotic movement. The weekly studio should give you practical programming skills,
applied AI guide and a skeleton of code to build on. Feel free to insert creative ideas within the
topics and use your own social imagination to add props, music or dance.

A brief research paper to report and discuss the research and design (R&D) of the topic, and to
showcase the working prototype by attaching a Youtube video link
The total word equivalent is in the order of 3,000 words excluding references. You should also be able
to demonstrate and present your R&D and reflection in the following structure:
❖ Title page contains the following:
▪ Eye-catchy Project topic and the personality of your robot
▪ A link to the 2-3 minutes Youtube video demonstration and GitHub
▪ Group members’ name with respective student numbers
❖ Keywords (3-5 keywords related to your research)
❖ Abstract (100-150 words): Background motivation, problem statement, research aims and
methods, key results and recommendations.
1. Introduction and Literature Review for [Humanoid Robot as an Assistant Physiotherapist] (500-1000 words)
1.1 The Traditional Methods and International Horizon for Robotics Intervention
1.2 Research Problem Statement
2. Design Research Method (300-500 words)
Discussion of the humanoid robot model and how you research and design the project.
Description with some figures or workflow (e.g. flow-chart, use case scenario, Choregraphe
screen shots or etc.) of the running robotic programme.
3. Finding and Reflection (400-800 words)
Implementation discussion, The list of
technical and ethical issues (at least two) faced while developing the robotic system and the
approaches in which these problems were handled or resolved. Critical Reflection upon
group’s experience of developing the robotic programme with ethical, social, cultural and
legal considerations.
4. Conclusions and Future Work (300-550 words)
The concluding remarks with key results and some recommendations for the future work.
❖ References (full list in Harvard Format) – the word count of this section is excluded”
